message.content:
Read these files thoroughly and provide a detailed analysis of their design patterns - how they structure their pages, what classes they use, spacing, typography, component composition, and overall layout approach. I need to understand the exact design language used across the app.

Read these files:
1. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/app/workspace/page.tsx
2. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/app/capture/page.tsx
3. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/app/globals.css
4. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/src/app/settings/page.tsx

For each page, extract:
- The outer wrapper structure (div classes)
- How SiteHeader is used
- The main tag structure (classes, padding, max-width)
- How content sections are composed (heading area, card areas)
- Title typography (exact classes)
- Subtitle/description typography
- Card structure (how they use bg, border, radius, padding - inline styles vs classes)
- Input styling if present
- Button styling if present
- Animation classes used
- Any inline styles used and why
- The overall visual rhythm and spacing between sections

Pay special attention to differences between the settings page and the other pages - what's inconsistent?

content.text: I'll read these files thoroughly to analyze their design patterns. Let me start by reading all four files.

Now I have all four files. Let me provide a detailed analysis of the design patterns across these pages. ## Detailed Design Language Analysis ### GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM (globals.css) **Color Architecture - Dark 900 Canvas:** - **Depth Layers:** L0 Canvas (#22242B) → L-1 Recessed (#1A1C22) → L1 Card (#2C2F38) → L2 Card Hover (#363940) → L3 Surface (#464950) → L4 Surface Hi (#62656D) - **Text Hierarchy:** - Primary: #F5F5F7 (headings, strong text) - Secondary: #A0A3AB (body text) - Muted: #6C6F78 (secondary info) - **Brand:** #F75105 (K3RN Orange primary), #F78E21 (lighter orange) - **Decision Palette:** GO (#22C55E), EXPLORE (#F59E0B), PARK (#6B7280), KILL (#EF4444) **Radius System - "Modern Rounded":** - sm: 6px, md: 8px, lg: 12px, xl: 16px, 2xl: 24px (standard card radius) **Background Pattern:** Body uses a subtle dot-grid pattern via radial-gradient (1px dots, 24px spacing, 3.5% opacity white) --- ### WORKSPACE PAGE (/workspace/page.tsx) **Outer Wrapper:** ```jsx
``` - Full screen container with brand orange selection highlight (30% opacity) - flex column layout with overflow-x hidden **SiteHeader Integration:** - Single line: `` - Placed directly after outer div, before main content **Main Tag Structure:** ```jsx
``` - Relative positioning with z-[1] for stacking context - flex-1 to fill vertical space - pt-12 (48px top padding), pb-40 (160px bottom padding for dock), px-8 (32px horizontal) - max-width 1400px, centered with mx-auto **Welcome Hero Section:** ```jsx
``` - Inline styles for background/border/shadow (dark secondary background, subtle border) - Inset box-shadow creates depth with 1px top light, -1px bottom micro-highlight - Rounded to 24px (2xl), p-8 (32px padding) - Animation: fade-in, slide from bottom-4 over 500ms **Title Typography:** ```jsx

``` - 2.5rem (40px) size, font-light weight - Text-white explicitly set - Negative letter-spacing (-0.02em) for tighter, premium look - 1.1 leading for tight headlines - mb-3 (12px) margin below **Subtitle/Description:** ```jsx

``` - text-base (16px) with muted color - Inline `` tags use secondary text color with font-medium - Flex with gap-2 for icon/stat alignment **Grid Container:** ```jsx

``` - Dynamic grid with gap-6 (24px), or gap-4 (16px) for list view - Responsive auto-fill with 300px minimum columns - Zoom-in-95 animation with fade-in over 500ms --- ### CAPTURE PAGE (/capture/page.tsx) **Outer Wrapper:** ```jsx
``` - Nearly identical to workspace, but selection background uses literal hex instead of CSS variable - Note: `[#F75105]/30` vs workspace's `[--color-brand-primary]/30` **Main Tag Structure:** ```jsx
``` - DIFFERENT from workspace: centers content vertically and horizontally using flex column - px-6 (24px) instead of px-8 - slightly narrower horizontal padding - gap-12 (48px) between hero and input card - pb-24 (96px) instead of pb-40 **Hero Text Section:** ```jsx

``` - Centered text with flex flex-col items-center - h1: 6xl (3.75rem/60px) base, 7xl (4.5rem/72px) on md breakpoint - font-light, tracking-tight (no letterspacing reduction), leading-[1.0] (tighter than workspace) - whitespace-nowrap to prevent wrapping **Input Card:** ```jsx
``` - Uses CSS variables with double-dash prefix: `bg-[--bg-card]`, `border-[--border-default]` - **INCONSISTENCY:** Workspace uses `var(--color-bg-secondary)`, Capture uses `[--bg-card]` (different naming!) - rounded-[24px] explicitly (not using radius-2xl token) - shadow-2xl (large shadow) - focus-within targets orange (#F75105) explicitly in inline class - backdrop-blur-sm for glassmorphism - group/card for child hover states **Textarea Styling:** ```jsx
